title: galium plumosum subsp. plumosum
intro: Galium plumosum subsp. plumosum, also known as woolly bedstraw or plumose bedstraw, is a flowering plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Galium plumosum subsp. plumosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
